title: Particle Tweaker
description: Tweak the amount and size of all particles.
body:
[![Swills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModderZellior/Image/main/bannerofswills.jpg)](https://swills.gg/?ref=ZELLIOR)

**Particle Tweaker**

Particle Tweaker gives you full control over Minecraft’s particle effects. This mod adds a menu that lets you adjust the size and amount of every particle effect in Minecraft. This menu is accessible via mod menu. Just press the mod menu button, go on to the mod and press configure. By configuring the particles, you can adjust minecraft to your liking. Whether you want cleaner visuals, better performance, or over-the-top chaos, Particle Tweaker puts the choice in your hands.

**Features**
- Adjust particle size and count independently
- Works with all vanilla particle types
- Changes apply instantly
- Particles are searchable
- Presets: 
- Reset – restore vanilla behavior instantly
- Insane – extreme effects for fun or chaos
- Danger mode (100x+) for more configuration.

**Why use Particle Tweaker?**
- Customize visuals for PvP, building, or cinematics
- Improve performance on lower-end systems
- It's client-side only

Join my [discord](https://discord.gg/r6zE2Pxs8J) for suggestions, feedback or bug reports!

This mod requires Fabric API and Mod Menu


<details>
<summary>Bugs and Bugfixes</summary>
- There is a known bug in 1.21.11-1.1: one slider affects the other slider. Will be fixed on 29. April 2026 and be released on the same day.-Fixed
</details>
